---
title: "Home"
---

# Welcome

Hi! My name is **Bhamini Raghuram Pillai**, and I am currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Digital Marketing at California State Polytechnic University, with an expected graduation year of 2026.

I am passionate about marketing analytics, data-driven decision making, and digital strategy. My goal is to build a career where I can combine business knowledge with analytics and technology to create impactful marketing solutions.

## Career Aspirations

My career interests include:

-   Marketing Analytics
-   Digital Marketing Strategy
-   Business Intelligence
-   Data Visualization
-   Consumer Insights
-   Marketing Technology

## Skills

Some of the technical and analytical skills I have developed include:

-   R Programming
-   SQL
-   Tableau
-   Excel
-   Quarto
-   Data Visualization
-   Marketing Analytics
-   BigQuery
-   Shiny Applications

## Education

### California State Polytechnic University

**Master of Science in Digital Marketing**\
Expected Graduation: 2026

## Portfolio Website

You can also visit my professional portfolio website here:

[Bhamini Portfolio Website](https://bhamini.netlify.app/)

## About This Website

This website was created using Quarto as part of a course assignment focused on building and publishing professional analytical websites. The website includes dashboards, essays on Shiny applications, and discussions about Shinylive technology.
